title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BAGUIDBIRIN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. CRUZ, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3502 / 49 OG No. 9, 3804 (September, 1953)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 960, June 20, 1953 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BAGUIDBIRIN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. CRUZ, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Baguidbirin, in the Municipality of Sta. Cruz, Province of Marinduque, is converted into a barrio to be called Baguidbirin.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1953.
